creator: matt@gsicomp.on.ca
text:
Whoops, I messed up the plist.  Here's a patch:

--- fidelio/pkg-plist.orig Fri Oct 20 23:47:49 2000
+++ fidelio/pkg-plist Fri Oct 20 23:45:08 2000
@@ -1,6 +1,3 @@
-/usr/X11R6/share
-/usr/X11R6/lib
-/usr/X11R6/include
-/usr/X11R6/share/locale/el/LC_MESSAGES/fidelio.mo
-/usr/X11R6/bin/fidelio
-/usr/X11R6/share/gnome/fidelio.default
+share/gnome/fidelio.default
+share/locale/el/LC_MESSAGES/fidelio.mo
+bin/fidelio
